message:
feat(runtime,store,server,command): real INFO stats, fix INCRBYFLOAT infinity

Server-wide stat counters:
- Add stat_total_commands_processed, stat_total_connections_received,
  stat_connected_clients to Store for INFO reporting
- Runtime increments command counter in execute_frame()
- Server tracks connections via track_connection_opened/closed() in
  accept_connections() and client cleanup
- INFO clients section shows real connected_clients count
- INFO stats section shows real total_connections_received and
  total_commands_processed

INCRBYFLOAT fix:
- Re-fix: remove is_infinite() from INCRBYFLOAT and HINCRBYFLOAT
  (Redis allows infinity, only NaN is rejected). Keep for ZINCRBY.
- Add explanatory comments for future clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
